IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: PROVIDES HOPE, TRAINING & SUPPORT TO PREVIOUSLY INCARCERATED & FORMERLY GANG INVOLVED PEOPLE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: PROVIDES HOPE, TRAINING, AND SUPPORT TO PREVIOUSLY INCARCERATED AND FORMERLY GANG INVOLVED MEN AND WOMEN, ALLOWING THEM TO REDIRECT THEIR LIVES AND BECOME CONTRIBUTING MEMBERS OF OUR COMMUNITY.
IRS990.Desc: WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT, JOB TRAINING & SUPPORT SERVICESCASE MANAGEMENT, CURRICULUM, JOB DEVELOPMENT, LEGAL SERVICES, MENTAL HEALTH, AIRPORT/LICENSING, RETREATS, TATOO REMOVAL. JOB TRAINING: HOMEBOY INDUSTRIES' 18-MONTH JOB TRAINING PROGRAM COMBINES ON-THE-JOB LEARNING WITH COMPREHENSIVE SERVICES AND UNCONDITIONAL SUPPORT. EACH YEAR, HUNDREDS OF FORMER GANG MEMBERS AND PREVIOUSLY INCARCERATED MEN AND WOMEN LEARN HARD AND SOFT JOB SKILLS IN THE ORGANIZATION'S SOCIAL ENTERPRISES WHILE RECEIVING SERVICES THAT FOSTER INNER TRANSFORMATION, CASE MANAGEMENT, TATTOO REMOVAL, LEGAL ASSISTANCE, MENTLA HEALTH SERVICES, ACADEMIC AND LIFE SKILLS CLASSES, AND EMPLOYMENT SERVICES.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: SOCIAL ENTERPRISESHOMEBOY BAKERY - TRAINEES AT ONE OF OUR OLDEST SOCIAL ENTERPRISE BUSINESS LEARN ALL ASPECTS OF BAKING, FROM ORDERING SUPPLIES TO OPERATING A PASTRY MACHINE TO INTERACTING WITH CUSTOMERS. WE SELL ARTISAN BREADS, PASTRIES, AND CAKES AT OUR HEADQUARTERS AND FARMERS' MARKETS AROUND LOS ANGELES, AS WELL AS TO LOCAL RESTAURANTS. HOMEBOY BAKERY WAS THE ORGANIZATION'S ORIGINAL MISSION BUSINESS, FOUNDED IN 1994, WHERE FORMER RIVALS WORKED SIDE BY SIDE AS SCRATCH BAKERS LOCATED IN AN 80-YEAR OLD BUILDING, THE BAKERY SUFFERED AN ELECTRICAL FIRE IN 1999. IN 2005, HOMEBOY HIRED SEVERAL YOUNG MEN TO PREPARE THEM TO BECOME LEADERS IN THE NEW BAKERY. THESE BAKERS ATTENDED CLASSES AT LOS ANGELES TRADE TECH AND INTERNED AT A LOCAL BAKERY, READYING THEMSELVES TO REOPEN THE BAKERY IN 2007 LOCATED IN THE NEW HOMEBOY FACILITY. HOMEBOY BAKERY REOPENED ITS DOORS TO THE PUBLIC ON OCTOBER 2, 2007, IN A MODERN, WELL-EQUIPPED HOME UNDER THE GUIDANCE OF MASTER BAKER ALVARO OCEQUEDA. THE LEAD BAKERS WORK ALONGSIDE TRAINEES HIRED TO TAKE THEIR FIRST STEPS IN THE BAKERY WORLD.HOMEGIRL CAFE - WHERE TRAINEES CAN BUILD SELF-ESTEEM AS WELL AS JOB SKILLS. BY WORKING ALONGSIDE OTHER TRAINEES, SOME OF WHOM ARE FROM "ENEMY" GANGS, HOMEGIRL CAFE TRAINEES BEGIN TO SEE EACH OTHER AS ALLIES. WORKING AS BUSSERS, SERVERS, LINE COOKS, AND SOUS CHEFS, THEY SERVE FRESH MEXICAN-FUSION BREAKFASTS AND LUNCHES IN A FAST-PACED ENVIRONMENT.FEED HOPE WAS CREATED IN APRIL 2020 TO RESPOND TO THE COVID-19 PANDEMIC WHICH EXPANDED THE NEED FOR PACKAGED MEALS FOR SENIOR CITIZENS AND THE UNDER SERVED COMMUNITIES. THROUGH SEVERAL FUNDING PARTNERS FEED HOPE WAS ABLE TO PROVIDE AS MANY AS 15,000 AND 25,000 MEALS WEEKLY. MERCHANDISE, CATERING, SILKSCREEN, DINER (@CITY HALL), JANATORIAL

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: HOMEBOY INDUSTRIES RECOGNIZES THE IMPACT OF TAX POSITIONS IN THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS IF THAT POSITION IS MORE LIKELY THAN NOT TO BE SUSTAINED ON AUDIT, BASED ON THE TECHNICAL MERITS OF THE POSITION. DURING THE YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2024, HOMEBOY INDUSTRIES PERFORMED AN EVALUATION OF UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS AND DID NOT NOTE ANY MATTERS THAT WOULD REQUIRE RECOGNITION IN THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS OR WHICH MIGHT HAVE AN EFFECT ON ITS TAX-EXEMPT STATUS.
HOMEBOY INDUSTRIES, INC. GRANTED FUNDS TO ITS CONTROLLED PUBLIC CHARITY HOMEBOY SERVICES, INC. ALL OPERATIONS OF HOMEBOY SERVICES, INC. ARE OVERSEEN BY HOMEBOY INDUSTRIES, INC.

BusTrInvolveInterestedPrsnGrp.RelationshipDescriptionTxt: ATHENA MURO IS GIL MURO'S (CFO) DAUGHTER
BusTrInvolveInterestedPrsnGrp.TransactionDesc: ATHENA IS AN EMPLOYEE OF HBI.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: NONCASH CONTRIBUTIONS ARE LISTED BY TOTAL NUMBER OF DONORS.
THE ORGANIZATION USES CARS, A 501(C)(3) NONPROFIT ORGANIZATION, TO PROCESS ALL VEHICLE DONATIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 1A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE INCLUDES 1) KELLI BERNARD, VICE CHAIR 2) JOE ARGILAGOS, TREASURER 3) MERCEDES MARTINEZ, BOARD CHAIR 4) FR. GREGORY BOYLE, SJ, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR 5) HILDA ECHEVERRIA, SECRETARY 6) THOMAS VOZZO, CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: FORM 990 IS REVIEWED BY THE CEO, CFO, AND AUDIT COMMITTEE CHAIR PRIOR TO FILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MONITORS COMPLIANCE BASED ON ITS CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE DETERMINES THE CEO AND CFO SALARY, WITHOUT THE INTERESTED PERSONS INVOLVED. THE CEO DETERMINES SALARY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
BAD DEBT EXPENSE -66,619. ACQUISITION OF REMAINING INTEREST IN HOMEBOY RECYCLING -25,000.
NO PROCESSES HAVE CHANGED FROM THE PRIOR YEAR.

IdDisregardedEntitiesGrp.PrimaryActivitiesTxt: CREATE MORE HIGH QUALITY JOBS FOR HOMEBOY'S TARGET POPULATION
SUPPORT CREATIVE VOICES OF THE HOMEBOY INDUSTRIES COMMUNITY

IdRelatedTaxExemptOrgGrp.PrimaryActivitiesTxt: PROVIDES HOPE, TRAINING & SUPPORT TO PREVIOUSLY INCARCERATED INDIVIDUALS
